actionConfiguration.body: SELECT COUNT(*) from public.schedule_results where operation ilike '%{{ScheduleTable.searchText}}%';

SELECT
  *
FROM
  public.schedule_results
WHERE
  "operation" ilike '%{{ScheduleTable.searchText}}%'
ORDER BY
  "{{ScheduleTable.sortOrder.column || 'order_id'}}" {{ScheduleTable.sortOrder.order !== "desc" ? "" : "DESC"}}
LIMIT
  {{ScheduleTable.pageSize}}
OFFSET
  {{ScheduleTable.pageOffset}}

SELECT
  machine,
  CONCAT('Order ', order_id, ' - ', operation) AS label,
  start_ts,
  end_ts,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_ts - start_ts)) / 3600 AS duration_hours
FROM schedule_results
ORDER BY machine, start_ts;

unpublishedAction.name: generateGanttMermaid

actionConfiguration.body: SELECT COUNT(*) from public.product_operations where product_name ilike '%{{ProductionOperationTable.searchText}}%';

SELECT
  *
FROM
  public.product_operations
WHERE
  "product_name" ilike '%{{ProductionOperationTable.searchText}}%'
ORDER BY
  "{{ProductionOperationTable.sortOrder.column || 'product_name'}}" {{ProductionOperationTable.sortOrder.order !== "desc" ? "" : "DESC"}}
LIMIT
  {{ProductionOperationTable.pageSize}}
OFFSET
  {{ProductionOperationTable.pageOffset}}

SELECT
    po.product_name,
    po.sequence,
    o.operation_id,
    o.name AS operation_name,
    o.duration,
    o.required_machine_type
FROM product_operations po
JOIN operations o
    ON po.operation_id = o.operation_id
ORDER BY po.product_name, po.sequence;
